description: Recto: Praises for the King Don Pedro, in Hebrew, followed by some Hebrew poetry. Verso: Two lines of accounts, possibly, followed by three lines in a mysterious language in Hebrew script (Turkish?), followed by a book list in Hebrew in a different hand. One of the books is the kabbalistic Maʿarekhet ha-Elohut with a commentary. The hands on this fragment look like roughly 15th or 16th century Sephardi hands. Needs further examination.
